headline: Waste Management (WM) Stock Weighs DCF Upside Against Premium P/E Multiple
summary: With Waste Management stock sitting at US$225.53, many investors are asking whether the current price still lines up with the company’s fundamentals or if expectations have run ahead of value. Over shorter periods the stock has shown mixed momentum, with returns of 5.1% over the last 7 days, 4.6% over the last 30 days, 3.3% year to date and 0.4% over the past year, which can influence how investors think about both growth potential and risk at today’s price.
